name: Quick, Southern Style Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bacon into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cut the onions into 1/2-inch wedges.
3. Mince the garlic clove.
4. Dice the bell pepper.
5. Drain the kidney beans.
6. Cook the bacon in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until browned but not crisp, about 5 minutes. Remove the bacon from the skillet; drain off all but a tablespoon of drippings.
7. Add the onions and garlic to the skillet; cook until the onions are tender but not brown, about 5 minutes.
8. Add enough water to make the broth 2-1/2 cups.
9. Add the broth, rice, bacon, thyme, and salt. Bring to a boil.
10. Stir in the bell pepper, cover tightly, and simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Add the diced green pepper; continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Remove from heat. Stir in the kidney beans.
13. Let stand covered until all liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
